                        Election 2026

                        Time, Tide & Tamil Part 26 | Anna's CM Crown: Landmarks, Legacy & Lingering Loss

                        Tamil Nadu is the graveyard of national political parties. It buried the Congress at its peak then in 1967. The BJP, also at its peak now, has been pregnant with possibilities but has failed to deliver. Never a serious player in the state before the dawn of the Modi-era, the BJP has been humbled in every election since his arrival in 2014 (2019, 2021 and 2024).

                        West Bengal Election

                        West Bengal Elections 2026: Where are Muslim-dominated seats headed?

                        The Trinamool Congress (TMC) has firmly established its dominance in Muslim-majority seats across West Bengal, winning 75 out of 85 such seats in the 2021 Assembly elections.

                        Assembly Elections 2026

                        Should've happened in 2016: DMDK joins hands with DMK, targets 200+ seats

                        The Desiya Murpokku Dravida Kazhagam (DMDK) has officially joined the DMK-led Secular Progressive Alliance ahead of the 2026 Tamil Nadu Assembly elections, marking a major political realignment. This alliance aims to secure a decisive victory by winning over 200 seats in the upcoming polls.

                        Tughlaqi commission working to please BJP: Mamata Banerjee blasts EC on SIR

                        DIU

                        Is a tiny vote gap becoming a landslide again in Assam?

                        In 2021, about a one-point statewide edge translated into a 25-seat advantage. In 2026, the result may again be decided less by rallies than by alliance math, especially the BPF's choice and where protest votes go.

                        Assam assembly polls likely to be conducted in single phase: Sources

                        Assam assembly elections may be conducted in a single phase, a significant shift from previous multi-phase schedules, according to sources.

                        Assam Election

                        Assam polls may be held in one phase, voting likely in first week of April: Sources

                        Sources say the EC may formally announce the election dates between March 4 and March 8. There will be a gap of at least 25 days between the announcement of poll schedule and voting day. In that case, polling is likely to be held in the first week of April, between April 3 and April 7.

                        Live blog

                        Highlights: Amit Shah in Assam on Feb 20, to take part in CRPF parade

                        Assembly Election News 2026 Live Highlights: As Assembly elections near, political temperatures are rising across Assam, Tamil Nadu, Kerala and West Bengal. In Assam, Gaurav Gogoi attacked the BJP over health, education and women's safety, while questioning Prime Minister Narendra Modi's visit. In Tamil Nadu, M K Stalin defended a Rs 5,000 payout to women and targeted the AIADMK, as the Opposition cried poll optics. Kerala saw audit clashes over Ayyappa Sangamam and textbook claims, while Bengal reshuffled IPS officers and advanced electoral roll revisions. Stay with IndiaToday.in for latest and live updates-

                        Assam Election

                        PM in Assam: Brahmaputra bridge inaugurated, projects worth Rs 5,400 crore launched

                        Prime Minister Narendra Modi reached Assam on Saturday morning to inaugurate and lay the foundation stones for multiple developmental projects worth approximately Rs 5,400 crore. A key highlight of the visit was the inauguration of the Kumar Bhaskar Varma Setu, a 1.24-kilometre-long six-lane bridge over the mighty Brahmaputra River.

                        22:46

                        Election 2026

                        His policy is to lie loudly: Amit Shah slams Rahul Gandhi over trade deal claims

                        Addressing a well-attended BJP rally in poll-bound Puducherry's Karaikal, Union Home Minister Amit Shah alleged that Rahul Gandhi, the Leader of Opposition in the Lok Sabha, 'has started a new tradition of telling lies daily'.

                        India News

                        Time, Tide & Tamil Part 24 | Anna Arch: Arrival of The Alliterative Architect

                        Conjeevaram Natarajan Annadurai – Anna to the masses – was born into a modest weaver family from the Sengunthar Mudaliar community, an environment where the rhythmic, hypnotic clatter of the handloom provided the background score to a life of early intellectual curiosity. The loom itself was a profound metaphor for his later life: Perfecting the art of weaving disparate, often contradictory threads of thought into a singular, durable fabric of social justice.

                        ASSEMBLY ELECTIONS 2026

                        Highlights: Amit Shah launches Booth Vijay Yatra in Puducherry

                        Assembly Election News 2026 Highlights: Prime Minister Narendra Modi visited Assam today. As part of his itinerary, he inaugurated several projects in the poll-bound state. One of the key projects launched by him in Assam was an emergency landing facility (ELF) on the Moran Bypass in Dibrugarh. He landed at the highway airstrip aboard a C-130J aircraft of the Indian Air Force (IAF), marking a historical moment for the entire Northeast region. This was PM Modi's third visit to Assam in three months. At Moran, he witnessed an aerial display of fighter jets, transport aircraft and helicopters. His next leg of the journey takes place in Guwahati. Besides Assam, Assembly elections are also set to be held in three other states and one union territory – namely West Bengal, Tamil Nadu, Kerala, and Puducherry. Except for Assam, the BJP has never held power in any of the states where Assembly polls are slated to be held in 2026.

                        BJP dismisses Vijay's claim of being DMK's sole competitor in polls: Inexperienced

                        Tamil Nadu BJP chief dismissed TVK chief Vijay's claim that he will win the upcoming assembly polls and form a government with an absolute majority. He called the actor-turned-politician "completely inexperienced" for claiming the TVK is the ruling DMK's sole competitor in the state.

                        Election Commission pulls up District Magistrates in Bengal over faulty uploads

                        The Commission made it clear that every document and decision would remain stored in the system and that concerned officers would be held personally responsible if any ineligible person is identified in future due to faulty verification.

                        Assembly Elections 2026

                        MK Stalin announces Rs 5,000 aid to 1.3 crore Tamil Nadu women, Vijay takes jibe

                        Tamil Nadu CM MK Stalin announced that his government credited Rs 5,000 each to 1.31 crore women and double the monthly assistance to Rs 2,000 if DMK won the upcoming Assembly polls. The move sparked criticism from political parties, including Vijay's TVK.

                        Tamil Nadu Election

                        AIADMK leader mocks death at Vijay's rally, says 'carry your coffin'

                        A political row has erupted in Tamil Nadu following the death of a participant at a rally organised by Vijay's Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) in Salem. AIADMK leader Kovai Sathyan reportedly posted an insensitive remark, suggesting attendees should 'carry your coffin to attend Vijay's rally'.

                        08:44

                        Tamil Nadu Election

                        AIADMK's 'coffin dance' jab at Vijay after man dies at his Tamil Nadu rally

                        The AIADMK took a swipe at TVK chief Vijay after a man died due to a heatstroke at his Salem rally, saying that people should carry a coffin to attend his rallies in the future.

                        TVK workers clash with journalists after Vijay's Salem rally

                        03:57

                        Tamil Nadu Election

                        Video: TVK workers, journalists clash after Vijay's rally in Salem

                        A clash erupted between TVK workers and journalists near Manima Hospital in Salem after Vijay's rally, with media persons alleging they were attacked by party cadres.

                        Tamil Nadu Election

                        Man dies after fainting at Vijay's rally in Salem

                        A tragedy has struck TVK leader Vijay's political rally in Salem, where one person reportedly fainted and subsequently passed away. The individual, who was reportedly from outside Tamil Nadu, was rushed to the Salem District Hospital but could not be revived.
